# External Pull Requests Are Not Accepted

This project does not accept external pull requests. All code is authored by AI agents — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details on the contribution model.

If you have found a bug or have a feature request, please [open an issue](https://github.com/cdalski/rlsp/issues/new/choose) instead. The maintainer reviews issues and AI implements accepted changes.
